best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-report_33-007 title: verify the data retrieval and presentation flow module: data retrieval and presentation source pages: 5, 6 preconditions: application is launched. test data: test steps: 1. load countries. 2. load states. 3. load regions. 4. load cities. 5. retrieve data from the api. 6. handle the message and present the data. expected result: the application should present the retrieved data to the user.
